description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Thank you very much for your generous hometown tax donations to Hanno City.

We are reporting on the donations received and how they are being used.

Fiscal Year 2025 (Reiwa 7) Hometown Tax Donation and Usage Report (PDF file: 2.9MB)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/sangyoshinkoka/furusatonozei/9107.html
summary: ℹ️ Report on Hometown Tax Donations and How They're Being Used
